# AI・データサイエンス・IT学習ノート

## Site purpose

stemtazoo.github.io is a Japanese learning blog that organizes beginner-friendly study notes for AI, data science, Python, G検定, 基本情報技術者試験（FE）, and Information Security Management Examination（SG試験） topics.

The site is intended to help readers review concepts, compare similar terms, and understand exam-oriented judgment criteria without claiming to provide APIs, tools, authentication services, commerce functionality, OAuth/OIDC discovery, WebMCP tools, or an MCP server.

## Primary audience

- Japanese learners studying AI, data science, Python, and IT basics
- G検定 learners who want conceptual explanations and confusion-prevention notes
- SG試験 learners who want practical security-management judgment criteria
- FE learners who want 科目A judgment criteria and 科目B reading practice
- Readers and AI assistants looking for public pages to cite or summarize accurately

## Main sections

- [SG試験 study notes and agent-readable Markdown list](https://stemtazoo.github.io/sg/llms.txt)
- [基本情報技術者試験（FE） study notes and agent-readable Markdown list](https://stemtazoo.github.io/fe/llms.txt)
- [G検定 study notes and agent-readable Markdown list](https://stemtazoo.github.io/gk/llms.txt)
- [DS・Python learning notes and agent-readable Markdown list](https://stemtazoo.github.io/ds/llms.txt)
- [Public SG section homepage](https://stemtazoo.github.io/sg/)
- [Public FE section homepage](https://stemtazoo.github.io/fe/)
- [Public G検定 section homepage](https://stemtazoo.github.io/gk/)
- [Public DS / Python section homepage](https://stemtazoo.github.io/ds/)
- [Site search](https://stemtazoo.github.io/search/)
- [XML sitemap](https://stemtazoo.github.io/sitemap.xml)

## Content use policy

- Search indexing is welcome.
- AI-assisted reading and citation are welcome.
- Use for model training is not preferred.

## Discovery notes for AI agents

Use the section-level llms.txt files to discover agent-readable Markdown versions of public learning articles. Use the sitemap and section index pages to understand topic groupings before citing individual articles.

This site is a static GitHub Pages / Jekyll blog. It does not advertise an API catalog, OAuth/OIDC discovery, OAuth protected-resource metadata, MCP server, WebMCP endpoint, DNS-AID record, commerce endpoint, or agent registration service.
